privileged_info_summary: Verified that the Monte Carlo risk analysis runs on synthetically generated uniform and normal distributions. The expected output file paths (/home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/monte_carlo_results.json and monte_carlo_lcoe.py) explicitly match the task description instructions. Running the 500-iteration PySAM Pvwatts calculation against the real NREL TMY3 Phoenix AZ solar resource mathematically confirms that the calculated P50 LCOE (~$0.056) and P90 LCOE (~$0.065) securely fall within the explicitly verified bounds (0.040-0.065 and 0.055-0.085).
